notes: Cluster labels are interpretive names assigned from centroid feature values.
The numeric cluster ids are arbitrary and may change if K-means is retrained.
Use these labels only with the matching cluster model/output.

clusters.label: Spoken / Live
clusters.rationale: Very high speechiness and liveness, almost no instrumentalness, and low popularity suggest spoken, live, comedy, podcast-like, or performance-heavy tracks rather than standard songs.

clusters.label: Ambient / Instrumental
clusters.rationale: Low energy, low danceability, high acousticness, and relatively high instrumentalness suggest quieter instrumental or ambient-like material.

clusters.label: Mainstream Pop / Rock
clusters.rationale: Higher energy, higher danceability, low acousticness, low speechiness, and higher popularity suggest conventional mainstream song profiles.
